channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Nobody understands smartphone design like Motorola, and I'm totally surprised by how good the Motorola Edge 2026 is
item.description: The Motorola Edge 2026 might have the best year-over-year improvement of any smartphone released in 2026, making it a great choice for mid-range buyers.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The back of the olive green Motorola Edge 2026 on a tea table next to a potted plant
media:content.media:text: The back of the olive green Motorola Edge 2026 on a tea table next to a potted plant
media:content.media:title: The back of the olive green Motorola Edge 2026 on a tea table next to a potted plant

item.title: Google's new Home Speaker looks all but confirmed for next week
item.description: A new teaser suggests Google's Home Speaker launch may be just days away.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Home Speaker next to a vase and plant
media:content.media:text: Google Home Speaker next to a vase and plant
media:content.media:title: Google Home Speaker next to a vase and plant

item.title: Android 17's newest feature feels like it was built for TikTok
item.description: Android 17 QPR1 Beta 4 introduces the new Screen Reactions feature alongside bug fixes.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The Android 17 logo on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

media:content.media:title: The Android 17 logo on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

item.title: June fixes for the Galaxy S25 rollout: Samsung adds those missing AI features
item.description: Samsung's June security patch was spotted on the Galaxy S25, and it's bringing AI features that were strangely missing.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 lock screen
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S25 lock screen

item.title: Google TV's getting ready for the World Cup the right way, and Gemini's coming, too
item.description: Google TV upgraded itself to get ready for the World Cup, while Gemini sneaks in a few new voice capabilities for viewers.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google TV Streamer Apps page

item.title: Which phone has the best camera for capturing a FIFA match? Check out my TOP 6 picks
item.description: If you need a quality camera phone to capture all of the excitement during the FIFA World Cup, you'll find it on this list.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Zooming in far with the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra's telephoto cameras

media:content.media:title: Zooming in far with the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra's telephoto cameras

item.title: Exclusive: The future of Viture smart glasses is bright. Very bright
item.description: Viture is one of the world's leading makers of smart glasses, and the company's upcoming roadmap is looking incredibly exciting.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Wearing a Viture Luma Pro smart glasses, holding Viture Beast
media:content.media:text: Wearing a Viture Luma Pro smart glasses, holding Viture Beast
media:content.media:title: Wearing a Viture Luma Pro smart glasses, holding Viture Beast

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus is so underrated that T-Mobile is now giving them away for free
item.description: The Galaxy S26 Plus is often overlooked, but that simply means that the balanced flagship is subject to some pretty great deals.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Galaxy S26 Plus face down on a table
media:content.media:text: Galaxy S26 Plus face down on a table
media:content.media:title: Galaxy S26 Plus face down on a table

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 vs. Galaxy Watch 8: Should you play the waiting game?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 should arrive in July 2026 but that's still a wait of a few months. Meanwhile, the Watch 8 can be bought right away and should offer nearly the same experience.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: The main app view on the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.
media:content.media:text: The main app view on the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.
media:content.media:title: The main app view on the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.

item.title: Chromecast users have had it: remotes struggle after update ruins their connection
item.description: Chromecast users report problems with their remote and its inability to keep a proper connection after a recent patch.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Chromecast With Google Tv Blur

item.title: Honor takes a stand: solidifies seven years of Android for Magic series in Malaysia launch

item.title: I wouldn't leave my house without these excellent headphones to accompany me on my summer travels

item.title: Why your iOS and Android eSIM transfers always failed — and how to do it right every time

item.title: DLSS for Android? I got an early look at Arm's neural graphics tech, and I'm excited
item.description: Arm just showcased Neural Dawn, a game built with its AI-assisted neural rendering techniques and dynamic lighting. I got an early look at the game, and I'm excited by its potential.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)

item.title: This external SSD is my must-have iPhone 17 Pro accessory — here's why
item.description: TeamGroup's PD20M is a MagSafe SSD that's easy to use, has a sleek design, and works great with the Pixel 10 Pro XL.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:title: TeamGroup PD20M MagSafe SSD design photos against a craft sheet

item.title: This hidden Gmail trick gives you virtually unlimited email IDs
item.description: Gmail ignores dots in an email, so you have a virtually infinite variation of Gmail IDs you can give out — all without having to create a new email account. Gmail aliases are particularly handy if you need to access a deal that's only limited to new users.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: The Gmail logo on a Pixel 6 Pro
media:content.media:text: The Gmail logo on a Pixel 6 Pro
media:content.media:title: The Gmail logo on a Pixel 6 Pro

item.title: UGREEN DXP4800 GT review: This 4-bay 10GbE NAS is built for enthusiasts
item.description: The DXP4800 GT is the latest addition to UGREEN's 4-bay NASync portfolio, and with two 10GbE ports and other extras, it is the ideal creator-focused mid-range NAS.
